title: Item Validation
excerpt:

posts.author: TSOGite (Cary Dwyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have boards where the Items are employee names. The correct format should be Headroom, Max (Last Name, First Name), but we’ve got Items for Max Headroom, Headroom M., Headroom Max, Max H., and etc…

Is there a integration or way we can setup a validation table that will serve as a drop down for people to choose the employee name.
